scope: single-seed exact-one-pass IID calibration of the factorized stoichiometry-first composition prior

data.split_rule: torch.randperm over the qualified child-train cache; first floor(0.95*n) rows fit and remainder calibrate
data.scientific_role: IID implementation/calibration screen only; formula/prototype-disjoint val remains an OOD diagnostic

model.context: constant-one null context plus node count, exact train-only partition prior, and shared count-position partition encoder

decision_rule.pass: qualify the factorized explicit stochastic composition prior and authorize only a separately frozen count-constrained site-assignment qualification
decision_rule.fail: stop before assignment; do not add steps, capacity, target composition or another composition head
decision_rule.boundary: This screen cannot qualify free joint H1a, L1/M1, tensor/oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
